display.purpose: Hero h1 only — Playfair at its largest, high-contrast serif voice.

title.purpose: h4–h6 and card titles; Geist sans for small-size legibility.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked clay kickers, badges, nav links — the only tracked-caps usage.

data.purpose: DM Mono for every stat: velocity, break, count, usage %.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover lift, paired with translateY(-2px) and a clay border shift.

shadows.name: red-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA resting glow; intensifies to 0 8px 32px rgba(200,16,46,0.35) on hover.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Input/select focus glow with a clay border.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: The single Mound Red call-to-action; reserved per the One Red Rule.
components.html: Start Learning
components.css: .ds-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 15px 36px; background: var(--red, #c8102e); color: #fff; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(200,16,46,0.25); transition: background 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-cta:hover { background: #a50d24; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(200,16,46,0.35); } .ds-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--clay, #c4793a); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The single deliberate clay kicker above a section heading — one system, not a per-block reflex.
components.css: .ds-label { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: var(--clay, #c4793a); }

components.name: Hero Badge
components.description: Clay-tinted pill used in the hero and as section eyebrows.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 7px 18px; background: rgba(196,121,58,0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(196,121,58,0.3); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--clay, #c4793a); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; }

components.name: Pitch Card
components.description: Signature component: family top-stripe, mono abbreviation chip, stat line, flat-at-rest with hover lift.
components.html:
FF

Four-Seam Fastball

The pitcher's hardest, straightest pitch — thrown to overpower.

Velocity
93–99 mph
Break
2–4 in
components.css: .ds-pitch-card { background: var(--card-bg, #131d30); border: 1px solid var(--card-border, #1f3050); border-top: 3px solid var(--fastball-color, #ef4444); border-radius: 18px; padding: 28px; transition: border-color 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-pitch-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: var(--clay, #c4793a); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .ds-pitch-abbr { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); color: var(--fastball-color, #ef4444); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.85rem; } .ds-pitch-title { margin: 14px 0 8px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: var(--heading, #f0f4f8); } .ds-pitch-meta { color: var(--text, #c9d5e3); line-height: 1.72; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-pitch-stats { display: flex; gap: 28px; margin-top: 18px; } .ds-pitch-stats dt { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: var(--muted, #94a3bb); } .ds-pitch-stats dd { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--heading, #f0f4f8); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Glossary search field — navy-mid fill, clay focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: var(--navy-mid, #111f3a); border: 1px solid var(--card-border, #1f3050); border-radius: 12px; color: var(--text, #c9d5e3); font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.28s, box-shadow 0.28s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted, #94a3bb); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--clay, #c4793a); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(196,121,58,0.1); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Uppercase muted nav link with a clay underline that wipes in from the left on hover.
components.css: .ds-navlink { position: relative; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted, #94a3bb); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-navlink::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1.5px; background: var(--clay, #c4793a); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-navlink:hover { color: #fff; } .ds-navlink:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; }

narrative.overview: A deep navy field sits under floodlights in the quiet seconds before a pitch. The ground is cool and near-black, lit by warm, sparing glows — clay amber, a single hot red, the cool wash of stadium blue. Nothing is bright by default; light is something the page earns. The personality is authoritative, inviting, and crafted — a printed sports annual translated to screen, with Playfair for the editorial voice, Geist for legible prose, and DM Mono presenting numbers as artifacts to admire. Density is editorial: generous rhythm, comfortable line height, varied section shapes over a stamped template.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy ground; warmth and color arrive as sparse, deliberate accents.
Serif display + sans body + mono data — three voices, each with a job.
Depth from atmosphere (colored glows, glass, lift-on-hover), not heavy shadows.
Pitch families are color-coded (red / blue / green) as a consistent legend.
Editorial pacing — varied section rhythm over uniform card grids.

rules.name: The One Red Rule
rules.body: Mound Red (#c8102e) is the only true call-to-action color — primary CTA and brand mark, almost nowhere else. A second red button on a screen means one is wrong.

rules.name: The Earned-Light Rule
rules.body: The ground is dark; color is light the page earns. Warmth lives in accents, type, and glows — never in the body background.

rules.name: The Serif-Up-Top Rule
rules.body: Playfair appears only at h1–h3 display sizes. Below ~1.3rem, switch to Geist — small Playfair turns spindly and hurts legibility.

rules.name: The Numbers-Are-Mono Rule
rules.body: Every stat is set in DM Mono so numbers line up and read as data, not prose.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat by default. Depth is a reaction to hover/focus/scroll, never a resting state.

dos: Do keep the body ground dark navy (#0a1628); let warmth arrive through clay, red, type, and glows — never a tinted-light background.
Do reserve Mound Red (#c8102e) for the single primary action and the brand mark.
Do set every stat and number in DM Mono so data reads as data.
Do use Playfair only at h1–h3 display sizes; drop to Geist below ~1.3rem.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest and let depth be a reaction to hover/focus/scroll.
Do color-code pitch families consistently (red fastball / blue breaking / green offspeed).
Do hold WCAG 2.1 AA — body text ≥4.5:1 on its navy surface.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback.
donts: Don't build the generic SaaS landing page — no gradient-hero-plus-feature-card-grid, no tiny tracked eyebrow on every section.
Don't let it read like a dry textbook / Wikipedia — no flat walls of reference text.
Don't adopt loud ESPN / sportsbook hype — no garish screaming graphics or ad-clutter density.
Don't go childish or clip-art — no cartoon illustration, emoji soup, or primary-color kiddie treatment.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as a card accent; the pitch-family marker is a top stripe only.
Don't introduce gradient text anywhere except the one existing metallic hero-headline shimmer.
Don't add a second red CTA to a screen, or set light-gray body text 'for elegance' — it breaks contrast on navy.
